channel.title: flove making-of — data-model questions
channel.description: New data-model design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should trusty merge Conditions into Protection fields?
item.description:
• Merge — Combine Conditions into Protection — one unified card. Simpler UI, less data duplication. • Keep separate — Conditions and Protection are distinct concepts. More cards but clearer semantics. • Conditional merge — Merge in the UI but keep separate in the data model. Best of both but more code.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Conditional merge
